title: YOUTH OPPORTUNITY PROGRAM - 211info
text: YOOP! NEWBERG SKILL CENTER YOUTH OPPORTUNITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational and vocational opportunities for youth and young adults. Services include pre-employment training, Rethinking Careers Workshops, GED preparation classes, college application assistance, student financial aid assistance. Offers assistance in obtaining documentation such as ID card, Social Security card, and birth certificate. Parenting classes available for youth who have children. Child care is not available at skill centers, but vouchers may be available. 100 E 5th Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Ages 16-24. Must meet income guidelines. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm by appointment Email (503) 554-1461 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 554-1461 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to register for orientation. Prior to entering, students must attend an orientation that outlines the program's mission and goals. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof legally able to work in the US and current school transcript AREA SERVED: Yamhill County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located 4 blocks south of Nap's at 5th and Main Street Services: College/University Entrance Support GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Parenting Skills Classes Tutoring Services Youth Employment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOOP! NEWBERG SKILL CENTER
